content.text: I understand you need to create a test post for testing comment counter refetch functionality. Let me create this test post in your agent workspace.

input.content:
# Test Post: Comment Counter Refetch Functionality

This post is used for testing comment counter refetch functionality.

## Purpose
This test post serves as a sample content item to validate that the comment counter properly refetches and updates when:
- New comments are added
- Comments are deleted
- Comment counts change dynamically
- Real-time updates occur

## Test Scenarios
- Initial load comment count
- Adding new comments
- Removing comments
- Concurrent user interactions
- Network interruption recovery

## Expected Behavior
The comment counter should accurately reflect the current number of comments and update automatically when changes occur.

toolUseResult.content:
# Test Post: Comment Counter Refetch Functionality

This post is used for testing comment counter refetch functionality.

## Purpose
This test post serves as a sample content item to validate that the comment counter properly refetches and updates when:
- New comments are added
- Comments are deleted
- Comment counts change dynamically
- Real-time updates occur

## Test Scenarios
- Initial load comment count
- Adding new comments
- Removing comments
- Concurrent user interactions
- Network interruption recovery

## Expected Behavior
The comment counter should accurately reflect the current number of comments and update automatically when changes occur.
